metadata.description: Garry's Stack — workflow skills for Claude Code. Plan review, code review, shipping, browser automation, and retrospectives.

plugins.name: gstack
plugins.description: Complete gstack bundle with all workflow skills: /plan-ceo-review (founder mode), /plan-eng-review (eng manager), /review (paranoid engineer), /ship (release automation), /browse (headless browser QA), /retro (weekly retrospective).
